untranslatable_reason: Flag pattern identification requires visual/structural pattern recognition (formation shape, trend line validation, minor high/low detection, breakout confirmation) which cannot be expressed using only the available price and technical indicators. The measure rule calculation depends on identifying specific swing points (trend beginning, formation low/high) that require pattern recognition logic beyond mathematical operators.
translation_notes: This signal describes a visual continuation pattern (flag) with entry/exit logic tied to pattern formation geometry and trend line breaks. While a simplified proxy using moving average crossovers is provided (entry when price crosses above/below MA for context-dependent direction), the actual flag pattern detection—including validation against Table 21.1 guidelines, identification of the minor high/low preceding formation, flag consolidation shape, and trend line breakout confirmation—requires structural pattern recognition unavailable in the allowed indicator set. The 13-day hold period reflects the example cited. Success rate parameters (64% bull, 11% 5pct failure rate) are noted but cannot be encoded as conditions.
